div1.entryFree: Requit, to retribute: exposed unto the sea, which hath r. it, him and his innocent child, Tp. III, 3, 71. let heaven r. it with the serpent's curse, Oth. IV, 2, 16 (thus F1; the rest of O. Edd. requite). the gods r. his charity, Per. III, 2, 75 (reading of Q1; the rest of O. Edd. requite). Cor. IV, 2, 12. 5, 76 (requitted).
